message:
🐛 Fix OPA card refresh loop and filter issues

- Add isCheckingRef to prevent duplicate check runs
- Remove progressive status updates that caused re-render loops
- Remove unused availableClusters variable
- Update all statuses at once instead of progressively

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
